secret_patterns.name: AWS Access Key ID
secret_patterns.reason: AWS Access Key ID exposed - provides full AWS API access.

secret_patterns.name: AWS Secret Access Key
secret_patterns.reason: AWS Secret Access Key exposed - complete compromise of AWS account.

secret_patterns.name: Google API Key
secret_patterns.reason: Google API key exposed - can lead to quota theft and service abuse.

secret_patterns.name: Generic API Key
secret_patterns.reason: Generic API key hardcoded - potential service compromise.

secret_patterns.name: Generic Secret/Token
secret_patterns.reason: Hardcoded secret or password - high risk of unauthorized access.
secret_patterns.context: Virtually never legitimate in production code

secret_patterns.name: GitHub Token
secret_patterns.reason: GitHub token exposed - complete repository access and supply chain risk.

secret_patterns.name: Slack Token
secret_patterns.reason: Slack API token exposed - can send messages, access channels, and exfiltrate data.

secret_patterns.name: Private Key Header
secret_patterns.reason: Complete private key exposed - severe security breach.

secret_patterns.name: Basic Auth in URL
secret_patterns.reason: Username and password embedded in URL - credentials exposed.

secret_patterns.name: Database Connection String
secret_patterns.reason: Database credentials in connection string - immediate data breach risk.

secret_patterns.name: JWT Token
secret_patterns.reason: JWT token hardcoded - session hijacking and impersonation risk.

secret_patterns.name: IP Address (Hardcoded)
secret_patterns.reason: Hardcoded IP address - potential C2 server or infrastructure exposure.
secret_patterns.context: Very common in legitimate code for localhost, test environments

secret_patterns.name: Email Address
secret_patterns.reason: Email address in source - potential PII exposure.
secret_patterns.context: Extremely common - email in comments, docstrings, author info

secret_patterns.name: Azure Storage Account Key
secret_patterns.reason: Azure Storage Account Key exposed - complete storage compromise.

secret_patterns.name: GCP Service Account Key
secret_patterns.reason: GCP service account key exposed - complete GCP environment compromise.

secret_patterns.name: Stripe API Key
secret_patterns.reason: Stripe API key exposed - payment processing and financial data at risk.
secret_patterns.context: Live keys never legitimate; test keys sometimes used

secret_patterns.name: Twilio API Key
secret_patterns.reason: Twilio API key exposed - SMS/call services at risk.

secret_patterns.name: SSH Private Key
secret_patterns.reason: SSH private key exposed - complete server/account compromise.

secret_patterns.name: JWT Secret
secret_patterns.reason: JWT secret exposed - token forgery and session hijacking.

secret_patterns.name: Redis Connection String
secret_patterns.reason: Redis connection with password exposed - data cache breach.

secret_patterns.name: NPM Token
secret_patterns.reason: NPM token exposed - supply chain compromise risk.
